name: kafka-learning-lab
description: Laboratorio pratico para aprender Apache Kafka com Node.js, TypeScript, Fastify, KafkaJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma e Next.js.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @kafka-lab/shared && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/kafka && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/api && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/worker-email && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/worker-stock && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/worker-analytics && npm run build -w @kafka-lab/playground
